score_history.description: fresh controlled-campaign baseline from current checkpoint rows; guard passed
stage 1: fresh synthetic scoring and shared-upstream validation; no source change required
[labels: full-traveler, critical-review] stage 2: completed 8/8 fresh pilot reproduction; all anchors still fail liner, fill, and CMP gates
[labels: full-traveler, critical-review] stage 4: 32/32 fresh Bosch-seed variance rows; robust best remains an infeasible liner/fill/CMP miss, not a winner
[labels: full-traveler, critical-review] stage 3: live ViennaPS/API and call-site knob registry completed; G003 is explicitly limited to 17 wired recipe factors
[labels: full-traveler, critical-review] stage 5: completed 512-row broad full-traveler screen; no feasible traveler, two 4/6-step robust misses selected only for shared-geometry interaction testing
[labels: full-traveler, critical-review] stage 6: completed 256-row shared-geometry downstream interaction study; fill and CMP remain failed, so widened controlled downstream expansion launched

[labels: full-traveler, critical-review] stage 7: completed 512-row widened downstream screen; fill/CMP still universally fail, high fill_iso boundary requires expansion and CMP mask-loss is visually documented
[labels: full-traveler, critical-review] stage 8: completed 240-row shared-geometry fill-isotropy boundary expansion; no zero-gap fill, no CMP pass, and 184 mask-consumption failures
[labels: full-traveler, critical-review] stage 9: completed two finalists x 16 unseen Bosch seeds; stable lower-dish four-step miss retained, gap-oriented alternative fails liner in 9/16
[labels: full-traveler, critical-review] stage 10: completed 324-row 3^4 shared-geometry local process-window map; 48/81 mask-surviving settings but no fill/CMP pass
[labels: full-traveler, critical-review] stage 11: completed post-window 16-seed finalist confirmation and final Pareto/interaction/model-ceiling critical review

stages.hypothesis: Historical anchors reproduce under the canonical full-traveler score.
stages.next: Measure Bosch stochastic variation before ranking recipes.

stages.hypothesis: The pilot ranking is stable enough to choose a broad-screen replicate policy.
stages.decision: Four seeds screen; 16 seeds decide finalist stability.
stages.next: Run a broad wired-space screen with four replicates.

stages.hypothesis: A feasible full traveler exists within the 17 wired recipe factors.
stages.decision: Broad wired-space screen finds no full traveler.
stages.next: Hold robust upstream anchors fixed and isolate downstream interactions.

stages.hypothesis: Apparent downstream effects persist when every arm sees the same Bosch geometry.
stages.decision: Fill/CMP failure persists without Bosch-noise confounding.
stages.next: Widen liner, barrier, fill, and CMP ranges around both anchors.

stages.hypothesis: A wider downstream search contains a mask-surviving fill/CMP region.
stages.decision: No fill or CMP pass; high fill-isotropy boundary expands.
stages.next: Test beyond fill_iso=0.20 before calling the edge point optimal.

stages.hypothesis: More isotropic fill closes the remaining centerline void.
stages.decision: Fill isotropy through 0.60 does not close the gap; 184 mask-loss rows.
stages.next: Stop widening that knob and confirm the credible four-step misses.

stages.hypothesis: The two best mask-surviving misses retain their ranking on unseen geometries.
stages.decision: Lower-dish four-step miss is stable; gap-focused arm loses liner stability.
stages.next: Perturb the stable reference to map the local robust-miss window.

stages.hypothesis: A local region preserves upstream gates and improves both fill and CMP.
stages.decision: 48/81 settings preserve mask; 0/81 passes all six steps.
stages.next: Confirm the new four-seed morphology candidate before comparison.

stages.hypothesis: The local-window candidate remains preferable on sixteen unseen geometries.
stages.decision: Both remain stable four-step misses; fill and CMP fail 32/32.
stages.next: Accept the model-space ceiling and specify the missing CEAC/CMP physics.
